name: Owlbear
special_abilities: [{"name":"Keen Sight and Smell","description":"The owlbear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell."}]
actions: [{"name":"Multiattack","description":"The owlbear makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws."},{"name":"Beak","description":"Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature.
